## Checklist
- [ ] Scope matches Opicer.md and current milestone
- [ ] No new public API without discussion
- [ ] Security impact considered (authz/authn/PII)
- [ ] No claim of official OPIC scoring or guarantees
- [ ] MVP scope respected (no STT/RAG/OAuth additions unless approved)
- [ ] Tests added or explicitly not needed
